title: BERH2 Lab Research
description: Developed a custom pointer encryption assembly instruction based on ARM's Pointer Authentication Code (PAC) to mitigate Spectre vulnerabilities.

title: DREAMs Lab Research
description: Researched and implemented the integration of conductive inks into FDM and SLA 3D printing processes to create embedded electronics within printed components.

title: Latis
description: Conceptualized a decentralized network platform designed to facilitate and verify secure firmware updates for IoT devices.

title: Politilink
description: Developed a Chrome extension leveraging GPT-3 to analyze news articles and connect users with their relevant local representatives based on the article's subject matter.

title: TJ REVERB (2U CubeSat)
description: Contributed to the systems engineering and hardware design of a 2U CubeSat, with a primary focus on the satellite's electronics and communication subsystems.

title: Band Aid Together
description: Engineered an IoT wearable seizure detection device utilizing Arduino and Firebase to deliver real-time emergency alerts.

title: Finance QuizzAR
description: Created an interactive augmented reality platform aimed at teaching financial literacy through gamified learning experiences and 3D quizzes.

title: Food Science NLP
description: Applied Word2Vec natural language processing models to correlate sensory descriptions with chemical compounds, revealing novel patterns in flavor chemistry.

title: Haptic Tactics
description: Designed and built a haptic feedback device to simulate aerospace drilling procedures in virtual reality, significantly enhancing immersion through tactile hardware integration.

title: Teach4Charity
description: Founded and managed a student-led tutoring initiative that successfully raised over $4,000 to support various charitable organizations.
